subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-10-25
subcodes.first_line: The gathering of the friends is like a magnet... There are mines in the sea as there are mines on the earth. The waves come and the salt is melted
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @station; mission; authority of Abdu'l-Baha, @love of God, @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @firmness in the Covenant
